questionText: Does your organization break down its Scope 1 and/or Scope 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type?
questionKo: 귀사는 온실가스 유형별로 Scope 1 배출량을 세분화하고 있습니까? `
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: For many sectors and business activities, greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide are significant and relevant. Since these gases are often only reported in CO2-equivalents (CO2e), their contribution to overall emissions is sometimes masked. CDP therefore requests companies to break down their gross Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by GHG type.

columns.text: Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type
options: Yes, both Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions
No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
optionsKo: 예, 모두 Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량
아니요, 하지만 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획입니다
아니요, 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획이 없습니다

columns.text: Primary reason for not providing an emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type
options: Only CO2 is relevant to our Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions inventory
Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 에 대한 아님 제공 배출량 세분화 온실가스 유형별
optionsKo: 만 CO2 당사의 Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량

columns.text: Explain why your organization does not break down its Scope 1 or 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type
columns.textKo: 설명 왜 귀사의 조직 아님 그것의 Scope 1 또는 2 배출량 온실가스 유형별

guidance.textKo: 전년 대비 변경사항은 2026 CDP 원문 및 변경 추적표 기준으로 확인하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Select one of the "Yes" options if your organization's gross Scope 1 and/or Scope 2 emissions inventory contains greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide; e.g. any of the other six greenhouse gases covered by the Kyoto Protocol (methane, nitrous oxide, hydrofluorocarbons, perfluorocarbons, sulfur hexafluoride and nitrogen trifluoride).
Explain why your organization does not break down its Scope 1 or 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type (column 3) 
This column is only presented if you select either of the "No" options in column 1 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type".
Describe the primary reason selected in column 2 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type" and explain any plans to provide a breakdown in the future.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: Preparing an emissions inventory: The GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard provides requirements and guidance for companies and other organizations preparing a corporate-level GHG emissions inventory.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 응답 작성 시 참고할 수 있는 추가 설명입니다. 필요한 경우 관련 기준, 방법론, 내부 검토 자료를 근거로 활용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/5 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 점 부여됨 당 완료 셀 비율 숫자 입력 의 셀 표시된. 이 경로에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 비공개 경로 선택지 아님 열에서 선택 '배출량 세분화 기준 온실가스 유형' - 0/5 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/5점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
Any option excluding the following selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 1 point
- 'Don't know'
- 'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years'
- 'No, but we plan to within the next two years'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0.5 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 points is available for this route
OR
ROUTE C)
'Don't know' OR 'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route
OR
ROUTE D)
'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' AND 'Only CO2 is relevant to our Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions inventory' selected in column 'Primary reason for not providing an emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points Is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' AND 'Only CO2 is relevant to our Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions inventory' selected in column 'Primary reason for not providing an emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points Is available for this route.

criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 점 부여됨 당 완료 셀 비율 숫자 입력 의 셀 표시된. 이 경로에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 비공개 경로 선택지 아님 열에서 선택 '배출량 세분화 기준 온실가스 유형' - 0/5 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/5점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
Any option excluding the following selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 1 point
- 'Don't know'
- 'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years'
- 'No, but we plan to within the next two years'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0.5 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 points is available for this route
OR
ROUTE C)
'Don't know' OR 'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route
OR
ROUTE D)
'No, and we do not plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' AND 'Only CO2 is relevant to our Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions inventory' selected in column 'Primary reason for not providing an emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected in column 'Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type' - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points Is available for this route.

change.question_ko: 귀사는 온실가스 유형별로 Scope 1 배출량을 세분화하고 있습니까? `
change.q2025_text: Does your organization break down its Scope 1 emissions by greenhouse gas type?
change.detail_change_types: Change to question text, New column
change.change_summary:
Updated question text to "Does your organization break down its Scope 1 and/or Scope 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type?" from "Does your organization break down its Scope 1 emissions by greenhouse gas type?".
New column
change.scoring_change_summary:
CC All sectors excluding Financial services Disclosure • Disclosure level is now scored proportionally. New columns scored for Disclosure. Scope 2 breakdowns will not be scored in 2026 as it is the first year of reporting but will be scored in 2027. This question is now a matrix question.
CC All sectors excluding Financial services Awareness • Awareness level scored based on selections in column ‘Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type'. New columns scored for Disclosure. Scope 2 breakdowns will not be scored in 2026 as it is the first year of reporting but will be scored in 2027. This question is now a matrix question
change.daml_summary: General: D 1/1 | A 0, 0.5 or 1/0 or 1 | M 0/0 | L 0/0

2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트,, &, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사는 온실가스 유형별로 Scope 1 배출량을 세분화하고 있습니까? `'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
